item.title: Cale Makar's wife Tracy Evans: Inside their love story and marriage
item.summary: Cale Makar and wife Tracy Evans have one of hockey's most enduring love stories, dating back to their middle school years in Calgary. Makar is still the king of the NHL; Evans has had a successful teaching career, out of the limelight. Here’s what we know about Tracy Evans, their relationship, engagement, wedding and life together.
